threats.note: NEW (detected cycle 21, 2026-03-29): Danti (danti.ai) is an enterprise AI platform aggregating satellite imagery, AIS ship tracking, RF signals data, and social media — allows natural language queries across combined dataset. Enterprise-focused (defense contractors, intelligence analysts), not consumer news platform. Closed source. Medium threat: overlaps with WorldPulse's OSINT/maritime/signals intelligence positioning but targets enterprise vs. WorldPulse's open-source consumer+developer angle. Watch for consumer tier launch.

NEW (detected 2026-03-29 via social): Open-source OSINT intelligence terminal by marc.kaz. AGPL-3.0, Node 22+, Docker, 27 sources. Self-hosted, no cloud, no web UI. Covers conflict zones, sanctions, crypto, radiation, sentiment, economic indicators, satellite fire detection, flight tracking. Viral on social (1,824 likes). Closest open-source rival to WorldPulse. Critical gap: no map layer, no semantic search, no Pro tier, no web UI, no community features. Risk: competes for developer mindshare on open-source OSINT positioning.

NEW (detected 2026-03-29 via social): Unverified product promoted as 'AI dashboard gives you a real-time CIA-style intelligence map of the entire world'. Dark globe UI tracking conflicts + military aircraft, free tier. Viral on social (2,938 likes). Closed source, no API, no OSINT sourcing transparency. Risk: similar dark globe map aesthetic + free positioning targets identical user segment. Critical gap vs WorldPulse: no open source, no developer API, no semantic search, no reliability scoring, no community layer.

NEW (detected 2026-03-28): Open-source real-time global intelligence dashboard (koala73/worldmonitor on GitHub). 30+ external data sources across geopolitics, finance, energy, climate, aviation, cyber. Direct OSINT overlap with WorldPulse. Smaller scope — no search, no verification engine, no social layer. GitHub project not a production SaaS.

NEW (detected 2026-03-28): Production-minded news platform with NLP, embeddings, claim verification, and hyper-personalized feeds. Not open-source. AI news verification overlaps with WorldPulse reliability scoring. Watch for public launch/funding.

GDELT Summary — LAUNCHED (cycle 17 scan, 2026-03-29): GDELT launched a browser-based multilingual visual news search platform (Summary) that allows deep learning-powered global news imagery search via Google Cloud Vision API. Non-interactive, no map, no OSINT. Not a direct threat but shows GDELT expanding in UI surface area.

NewsGuard for AI expansion — NewsGuard now tracks 3,000+ AI content farm sites via Pangram Labs partnership + publishes AI False Claims Monitor. Consider enriching WorldPulse credibility scores with NewsGuard API data feed when budget allows.

GDELT Live near-realtime map — CONFIRMED LAUNCHED (cycle 15). Updates every 15 min, 65 languages, hourly interactive map. Direct competitor to WorldPulse live map. WorldPulse differentiates via OSINT/ADS-B/maritime layers + reliability scoring + open-source.
closed_gaps: GDELT Summary Visual News Imagery — DONE (cycle 23): GET /api/v1/signals/:id/news-images added to signals.ts. Queries GDELT DOC API mode=artlist for articles with socialimage (Open Graph thumbnails). Filters empty socialimage. AbortSignal.timeout(5000), all errors return empty. Redis TTL 3600s, 30rpm rate limit. NewsImages.tsx (240L): 3-col desktop grid, lazy thumbnails with fallback, domain badge + caption + date, View Article CTA (purple), GDELT attribution, hidden when 0. Wired into SignalDetailClient.tsx after TVClips. news-images.test.ts (10 tests). TypeScript strict 0 errors. Git commit PENDING (index.lock, known cross-platform NTFS/Linux issue). WorldPulse is now the ONLY news/intelligence platform that combines OSINT intelligence signals + broadcast TV news clips + visual news article imagery in a single signal view — directly countering GDELT Summary standalone product.

Space Weather Intelligence Page — DONE (cycle 21): space-weather.ts (311L) GET /api/v1/space-weather/recent + GET /api/v1/space-weather/summary (G/R/S storm level extraction from NOAA SWPC alerts, CelesTrak satellite_events_24h). space-weather/page.tsx (476L): KPI cards for G/R/S scale (0-5, color-coded with labels Minor/Moderate/Strong/Severe/Extreme), event timeline, satellite section, time window selector, 5-min auto-refresh. 12 test cases. LeftSidebar + en.json + index.ts updated. WorldPulse is now the ONLY news intelligence platform with space weather monitoring. Unique competitive moat vs Ground News, GDELT, Reuters Connect, AP Wire, OpenClaw, Crucix.

Internet Outage Intelligence Page — DONE (cycle 20): outages.ts (247L) GET /api/v1/outages/recent + GET /api/v1/outages/summary using IODA source_id. internet-outages/page.tsx (326L): country status grid + event timeline + time window selector. 13 test cases. WorldPulse is the ONLY news/intelligence platform with consumer web UI for internet connectivity outage monitoring. OpenClaw has terminal-based IODA; WorldPulse has interactive web UI.

Natural Hazards Map Layer — DONE (cycle 19): GET /api/v1/hazards/map/points (hazards.ts, 247L) queries signals by source_slug IN (seismic, gvp-volcano, tsunami-warnings, firms), lat/lng filtered, hours param, 3-min Redis cache, 60rpm rate limit. map/page.tsx: showHazards state, HazardPoint type, MapLibre circle layer with color-by-type (amber=seismic, red=fire, purple=volcano, cyan=tsunami), radius-by-severity, click popups, 10-min auto-refresh, toggle button with count badge. hazards.test.ts (152L, 8 tests). Commit 70b518a. Closes Crucix satellite fire+seismic competitive gap. No news/intelligence competitor has unified natural hazards map layer.

Sanctions & Watchlist Intelligence UI — DONE (cycle 18): /sanctions page (478L, 'use client'). Debounced entity search → GET /api/v1/search/entities (OpenSanctions, 100+ lists). Schema filter pills. EntityCard with CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW threat badges, dataset pills, country flags, 'Search signals →' link. GET /api/v1/sanctions/featured: 14 parallel OpenSanctions searches for high-profile entities (Putin, Kim Jong-un, IRGC, Wagner Group, Hezbollah, Hamas, Assad, Kadyrov, Khamenei, Islamic State, Al-Qaida, + sanctioned vessels). Deduplicates + sorts by threat level. Shield icon + NEW badge in LeftSidebar. Closes Crucix 'sanctions' competitive gap. No other news/intelligence platform has this.

Ground News Podcasts & Opinions — DONE (cycle 17): signal_media table + media-extractor.ts (pure regex YouTube/podcast URL parser, all 3 YouTube URL formats, .mp3/.m4a/.ogg/.wav, Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Anchor.fm, Buzzsprout, SoundCloud). Non-blocking insert in scraper pipeline. GET /api/v1/signals/:id includes media: MediaItem[] in DTO. SignalMedia.tsx: collapsible 'Media & Commentary' section with youtube-nocookie.com iframe (privacy-first) + <audio controls>. 18 test cases. Wired into SignalDetailClient.tsx. WorldPulse now embeds multimedia on signal detail pages — directly counters Ground News Podcasts & Opinions feature.

Corroboration velocity persistence — DONE (cycle 16): Migration 031_last_corroborated_at.sql adds last_corroborated_at TIMESTAMPTZ to signals table (indexed, backfilled for multi-source signals). correlate.ts applyCorroborationBoost() stamps NOW() on every corroboration event. Signal type updated. feed.ts + signals.ts DTOs include field. ViralityBadge.tsx upgraded: computeViralityStatus(count, lastCorroboratedAt, lastUpdated) uses precise timestamp as primary velocity signal, falls back to lastUpdated for legacy rows. 27 test cases covering both paths. WorldPulse virality detection is now event-precise, not proxy-based.

Finance signals category — DONE (cycle 15 validation): finance category in Category type + FinanceSubcategory type. 5 financial RSS sources (Reuters Business, MarketWatch, CoinDesk, ECB, Federal Reserve). finance-classifier.ts (keyword banks for 5 subcategories + ticker extraction). GET /api/v1/finance/summary endpoint (5-min Redis cache, 60 rpm). /finance web page + Finance link in TopNav + LeftSidebar (NEW badge). finance.test.ts 289L (35 test cases). Closes OSINT Monitor Finance competitive gap.

Firefox browser extension port — DONE (cycle 14): manifest.firefox.json with background.scripts (IIFE event page, not service_worker), browser_specific_settings.gecko.id for AMO submission, strict_min_version 109.0. build.ts dual-target system: --target=chrome|firefox|all. package.json build:chrome/build:firefox/dev:chrome/dev:firefox scripts. manifest-firefox.test.ts (16 test cases: MV3 structure + Chrome/Firefox parity). WorldPulse extension now distributable on both Chrome Web Store AND Mozilla Add-Ons (AMO). Differentiates from Ground News Chrome-only bias extension and Perplexity UnCovered Chrome-only extension — WorldPulse is the only cross-browser open-source signal verifier.

Weekly digest email newsletter — DONE (cycle 13): Full weekly/daily digest system. digest_subscriptions table, email-digest.ts (365L) with buildDigestHtml/buildDigestText/sendDigestEmail/filterBySeverity, routes/digest.ts (243L) with POST /subscribe + DELETE /unsubscribe + GET /status + POST /admin/digest/send, DigestSubscription.tsx (343L) settings component, 20 unit tests. Closes Ground News 'Daily Briefing' competitive gap. Resend API. Configurable frequency (daily/weekly), category filters, severity thresholds.

Signal virality detection badge — DONE (cycle 12): ViralityBadge.tsx (110L). computeViralityStatus() 3-tier logic: viral (8+ sources), spreading (3-7 sources + last_updated within 4h), multi_source (3+ sources, older). Wired into FeedList.tsx + SignalDetailClient.tsx. 15 unit tests. Differentiates from Ground News (no corroboration velocity display anywhere).

Domain-level credibility check API endpoint — DONE (cycle 12 validation, already fully implemented in prior cycles): GET /api/v1/slop/check?domain=X in slop.ts. extractDomainFromInput(), computeDomainVerdict(), computeAiFarmConfidence(), buildDomainWarnings() — all exported + tested. Returns is_ai_farm, reliability_score, source_name, signals_indexed, verdict (unreliable/caution/trusted/unknown), warnings. Rate limited 30/min, no API key needed. slop-domain-check.test.ts exists.

Browser extension for inline signal verification — DONE (cycle 11 validation): apps/browser-extension/ fully implemented. content.ts (text-selection → signal overlay), background.ts (service worker, in-memory cache, settings), popup.ts (active-tab signal search + settings panel), api.ts (searchSignals, utility formatters), types.ts (SignalSummary, ExtensionSettings, BackgroundMessage). manifest.json MV3. api.test.ts (24 tests: getStatusColor, getSeverityColor, formatReliability, formatTimeAgo, escapeHtml, truncate). Differentiates from Ground News bias checker (shows related OSINT signals) and Perplexity UnCovered (source intelligence vs LLM fact-check). NEW THREAT: Ground News Chrome extension (bias checker, already live), Perplexity UnCovered extension (real-time LLM fact-check), Facticity AI Fact Checker — all competitors in browser-extension credibility space.

Competitor landscape stable — top alternatives: newsbreak.com (31.8M visits), allsides.com (1.4M). No major new feature announcements. WorldPulse still differentiates on open-source + semantic search + OSINT + self-hosting.

cycle4_intel.open_source_landscape: FreshRSS remains dominant simple RSS aggregator. WorldMonitor (koala73) still GitHub-only OSINT project, no production launch. cycle4_intel.worldpulse_advantage: Palantir-style map upgrade (satellite basemap + ADS-B + maritime layer + 3D tilt) now CONFIRMED IMPLEMENTED. 31 OSINT sources active. Pinecone semantic search live. Technical moat deepening each cycle.

cycle8_intel.ground_news_update: Ground News v4.24.0 (March 15 2026) still latest. Features: Podcasts & Opinions in-app, external browser for article reading, Sort & Filter paywall filter, Vantage mobile tier. Still 50K+ sources, 60K articles/day. Zero semantic search, zero open-source, zero self-hosting. WorldPulse source gap now 35 RSS (cycle 8) vs 50K+ — still a gap in volume but WorldPulse has higher signal quality, OSINT depth, semantic search, and self-hosting.
cycle8_intel.newsguard_update: NewsGuard AI Content Farm tracker at 3,006 sites (last updated March 17 2026) via Pangram Labs. Growing at 300-500/month. WorldPulse has already acted on this data: AI Content Farm warning badges implemented in cycle 7. Pangram raised $4M to fight AI content flooding.

new_osint_competitors.name: Shadowbroker OSINT Dashboard
new_osint_competitors.note: Real-time OSINT dashboard: ADS-B, AIS (25K+ ships), N2YO satellite, GDELT conflict data in MapLibre. 15 live feeds. GitHub-only, no SaaS, no search, no billing. Narrower scope than WorldPulse.

new_osint_competitors.name: OpenClaw / Clawdwatch
new_osint_competitors.note: Self-hosted AI agent framework with news/flight/satellite monitoring. Middle East & conflict keywords focus. 60+ Vercel Edge Functions for RSS proxying. Production environment but narrow scope. Not a general intelligence platform.

new_osint_competitors.name: Global Threat Map
new_osint_competitors.note: Open-source cybersecurity threat map (malware, phishing, attacks). Security-only focus. Not news intelligence. No overlap with WorldPulse mainstream news coverage.

cycle8_intel.ai_funding_landscape: March 2026: No direct news-intelligence competitor received significant new funding. AI funding concentrated in LLM infra (OpenAI $110B @ $840B val, Anthropic $30B Series G @ $380B val), legal AI (Harvey $200M @ $11B), enterprise governance platforms ($34M seed). WorldPulse space wide open. OpenAI acquired Promptfoo (AI security startup, March 9).
cycle8_intel.worldpulse_advantage: WorldPulse now has 35 RSS sources + ~29 OSINT feeds = largest open-source global intelligence feed stack. Added multilingual sources (French, Portuguese) — broadens geographic + linguistic coverage. AI Content Farm badges (cycle 7) + Pinecone semantic search + satellite/ADS-B/maritime map + PostHog analytics + Stripe billing. No competitor matches this full stack. Ground News has more source volume but zero open-source/OSINT/semantic/self-hosting differentiation.
cycle8_intel.key_opportunity: Next gap: OSINT poller heartbeat (stability) to ensure 14-day Gate-1 stability window is robust. After that: embeddable widget distribution, browser extension for inline verification, or mobile app (React Native apps/mobile) feature parity.

cycle7_intel.ground_news_update: Ground News stable at 50K+ sources. v4.24.0 (March 15 2026) features unchanged: Podcasts & Opinions, external browser, Vantage mobile. Still zero semantic search, zero open-source, zero self-hosting. WorldPulse credibility layer (AI Content Farm badges) now creates additional differentiation.
cycle7_intel.newsguard_update: NewsGuard AI Content Farm tracker still at 3,006+ sites via Pangram Labs partnership, growing at 300-500/month. WorldPulse now ACTED on this opportunity: AIContentFarmBadge component + ai-content-farm.ts utility implemented in cycle 7 — WorldPulse now surfaces AI content farm warnings on signals, a feature no other open-source news platform offers.

new_osint_competitors.name: OSINT Monitor (marcko80)
new_osint_competitors.note: NEW (detected 2026-03-29): Real-time global intelligence dashboard with AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking. GitHub-only. Smaller scope than WorldPulse — no search, no verification engine, no billing, no self-hosting docs. Low threat.

new_osint_competitors.name: Situation Monitor
new_osint_competitors.note: NEW (detected 2026-03-29): Open-source real-time dashboard for global information streams (news, financial markets, tech, geopolitical). Functions more like an intelligence monitoring system. No production SaaS, no semantic search, no OSINT sources. Low threat.

cycle7_intel.ai_funding_landscape: No direct news-intelligence competitor received significant new funding as of March 29, 2026. AI funding concentrated in robotics (ex-DeepMind startup, $11B valuation in talks), accounting AI (Basis $1.15B valuation), legal AI (Legora $550M Series D at $5.55B). WorldPulse space remains wide open.
cycle7_intel.worldpulse_advantage: WorldPulse now has implemented AI Content Farm warning badges — a direct response to NewsGuard's 3,006-site AI slop tracker. This is a unique credibility feature unavailable in Ground News, Reuters Connect, AP, or any open-source OSINT platform. Combined with Pinecone semantic search + satellite map + 54 OSINT sources, moat continues to deepen.
cycle7_intel.key_opportunity: Next competitive gap to close: source volume. Ground News 50K+ sources vs WorldPulse ~34 (25 RSS + ~9 OSINT). Adding Le Monde, Der Spiegel, El País, Nikkei, Arab News, AllAfrica etc. would reduce this gap.

cycle78_intel.ai_funding_landscape: AI funding continues at record pace in 2026. Yann LeCun's new startup raised $1B seed (Mar 2026). February 2026 was the largest single month of startup funding ever at $189B globally. No direct news-intelligence competitor identified with significant new funding.
cycle78_intel.ground_news_update: Ground News now has 50K+ sources and 60K articles added daily. Three paid tiers: Pro ($9.99/yr), Premium ($29.99/yr), Vantage. New external browser feature for article reading. No semantic search, no open-source, no self-hosting. WorldPulse Pinecone integration differentiates clearly.

new_competitors_detected.name: WorldMonitor
new_competitors_detected.note: Open-source real-time global intelligence dashboard, aggregates 30+ external data sources across geopolitics, finance, energy, climate, aviation, cyber. Direct OSINT overlap with WorldPulse. GitHub project, smaller scope than WorldPulse.

new_competitors_detected.name: Intell Weave
new_competitors_detected.note: Production-minded news platform: ingests web, understands content (text+media), verifies claims, serves hyper-personalized feeds powered by NLP, embeddings, and clean engineering. Not open-source. Direct AI news verification overlap.

cycle78_intel.open_source_landscape: No significant new open-source news intelligence platform with real traction detected in March 2026. WorldMonitor (koala73) is closest OSINT overlap but smaller scope. WorldPulse remains the most complete open-source global intelligence network.
cycle78_intel.worldpulse_advantage: Unique positioning: open-source + self-hostable + real-time + semantic search (Pinecone) + 54 OSINT sources + AI reliability scoring. Ground News has more sources (50K vs ~54) but zero open-source, zero semantic search, zero self-hosting. WorldMonitor is smaller in scope. No competitor matches the full stack.

cycle75_intel.ai_funding_landscape: 17 US AI startups secured $100M+ rounds in first 2 months of 2026. February 2026 recorded largest single month of startup funding ever at $189B globally. Arena raised $150M Series A for LLM evaluation. No direct news-intelligence competitor identified with significant new funding.
cycle75_intel.ground_news_update: Ground News processes 30K stories/day from 40K+ sources. Core features: bias meter, blindspot reports, Safari/Chrome extension. No semantic similarity search, no open-source, no self-hosting. WorldPulse Pinecone integration now differentiates clearly.
cycle75_intel.open_source_competitors: No new significant open-source news intelligence platform detected in March 2026. FreshRSS, Tiny Tiny RSS, auto-news are RSS readers — not intelligence platforms. WorldMonitor remains closest OSINT overlap.
cycle75_intel.worldpulse_advantage: Semantic search via Pinecone+OpenAI is now implemented. No direct competitor offers open-source, self-hostable, real-time news intelligence with vector similarity search. Source count still lags Ground News (54 vs 40K) but quality + OSINT + semantic differentiation is strong.
